src/main/java/ch/salon/config/AsyncConfi.general_idea: Reorder imports to group java.* imports after third-party imports, likely due to IDE formatting rules.

src/main/java/ch/salon/config/CRLFLogCon.general_idea: Move java.util imports to after third-party imports to follow standard Java import ordering conventions.
Reformat the array initializer for SAFE_LOGGERS to place elements on the same line as the opening brace.
Break a long if-condition across multiple lines to improve readability and adhere to line-length limits.

Move the jcacheConfiguration field declaration to the top of the class for better readability.
Reformat the cache configuration builder chain to fit on fewer lines.
Remove the Authority cache entry from the JCache manager customization.

src/main/java/ch/salon/config/DatabaseCo.general_idea: Remove unnecessary whitespace inside annotation arguments and fix class body formatting.

src/main/java/ch/salon/config/LoggingAsp.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for specific Spring annotations.
